name: Dragon Park
description: Dragon Park is the largest theme park in Southeast Asia located in Ha Long, Quang Ninh, Vietnam.  It opened on January 25, 2017.  The amusement park is part of a large resort complex known as Sun World Halong Complex that includes an aerial tramway called the Queen Cable Car, Sun Wheel — a large observation wheel, as well as gardens, restaurants, a shopping district and a family entertainment center with arcade games.
